nasb.text: Zedekiah king of Judah and his officials I will give into the hand of their enemies and into the hand of those who seek their life, and into the hand of the army of the king of Babylon which has gone away from you.

esv.text: And Zedekiah king of Judah and his officials I will give into the hand of their enemies and into the hand of those who seek their lives, into the hand of the army of the king of Babylon which has withdrawn from you.

cnv.text: 我也必把猶大王西底家和眾領袖交在他們仇敵的手中，和那些尋索他們性命的人的手中，以及那些從你們面前暫時撤退的巴比倫王的軍隊的手中。

ccb.text: 我要把犹大王西底迦及其官员交在想杀他们的敌人手中，交在刚撤军的巴比伦王手中。
